assumptions: The instruments in question are financial assets within the scope of IFRS 9.
The issue concerns the subsequent measurement classification of debt instrument tranches, not hedge accounting or derecognition.

approaches.label: Amortised cost
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies amortised cost as a top-level classification for financial assets, including debt instruments, when the relevant classification requirements are met.

approaches.label: Fair value through other comprehensive income
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies fair value through other comprehensive income as a distinct top-level classification for financial assets when the relevant classification requirements are met.

approaches.label: Fair value through profit or loss
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies fair value through profit or loss as the residual classification for financial assets, and the contractually linked instruments guidance explicitly states that a tranche must be measured at fair value through profit or loss in certain cases.
